name: surfagent-gmail
description: Gmail MCP adapter for SurfAgent with mailbox navigation, visible thread extraction, and state inspection.
author: SurfAgent <support@surfagent.app>

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/smoke.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/smoke.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
